summary: Critical failure: missing tests/version_bumper.bats. Workflow references 'bats tests/version_bumper.bats' but file not provided—workflow fails on `act` execution. Test harness asserts '1..29 bats tests passed' but will find zero tests. Core scripts (bump-version.sh, run_act_tests.sh) show excellent Bash practices: set -euo pipefail, clear error handling, modular functions, great comments (whyExplained, not what). Script logic is sound. Workflow YAML is well-structured with sensible demos covering patch/minor/major/package.json cases. But without the test file, requirements unmet: 'All tests must be runnable with `bats` and must pass' and 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' cannot be verified. Workflow will fail at 'Run bats unit tests' step. Not shippable.
